overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a misty mountain valley in a video game environment. The camera glides smoothly past a large solitary acacia tree and along steep cliff faces shrouded in heavy fog, showcasing detailed rock textures and atmospheric volumetric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide misty mountain valley with layered peaks fading into the fog. The drone moves slowly forward through the diffuse morning light, revealing rocky terrain and scattered vegetation. Around the 12-second mark, a large solitary acacia tree enters from the right, becoming the focal point as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with prominent acacia tree and cliff face

events.description: camera banks slightly left to track around the large tree
large tree exits frame left, revealing steep cliff face ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating drone around the large tree while ascending slightly to reveal the cliff face behind it

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall with layered geological textures

segments.scene_description: The drone navigates around the prominent acacia tree, which dominates the center of the frame before moving to the left. As the camera banks left, a massive rocky cliff face is revealed behind the tree. The background mountains fade into the distance as the focus shifts to the detailed cliff textures and vegetation growing from its crevices.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliff face with scattered vegetation in heavy mist

agents.ego_description: slowly flying drone along the cliff face, examining rock textures and vegetation growing from crevices

entered.detail: small trees and shrubs growing from rock crevices on the cliff face

segments.scene_description: With the large tree now behind, the drone continues along the steep cliff face in a more enclosed space. The camera focuses on the detailed rock textures and vegetation clinging to the cliff. Heavy mist surrounds the scene, creating an atmospheric, intimate view of the mountain's geology as the camera moves slowly forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a misty mountain valley that transforms from a wide, open vista into an intimate exploration of a steep cliff face. It begins by moving slowly through diffuse morning light across layered peaks and rocky terrain, where a large solitary acacia tree gradually enters the frame from the right to become the central focus. As the camera banks left to navigate around the tree, the expansive background mountains fade away, revealing a massive rocky cliff face hidden behind the foliage. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed space, gliding closely along the precipice to highlight detailed rock textures and vegetation clinging to the crevices. Finally, the camera pushes forward through heavy, enveloping mist, focusing on the atmospheric geology of the mountain wall.
